title: GTCEuM Indicators
description: Adds several indicators to help identify circuits, boards, wafers, chips etc
body:
# This resourcepack adds Usernm0-style indicators as overlays to several GTCEuM items
**_You can use whatever resource pack you want, and this pack will overlay the indicators._**

**Currently implemented:**

Circuits (Voltage)

Boards (Tier)

Molds (Casting/Extrude Shape)

Boules (Material)

Wafer (Material/Type)

Chips (Type)

Batteries (Voltage/Material)



**Monifactory:**

A Monifactory addon is available!



# Credits

The letters, numbers and symbols used for the overlays in this resource pack were extracted from GTNH-Textures-Usernm by Usernm0 [https://github.com/Usernm0/GTNH-Textures-Usernm?tab=CC-BY-4.0-1-ov-file](https://github.com/Usernm0/GTNH-Textures-Usernm?tab=CC-BY-4.0-1-ov-file) which is licensed under CC-BY 4.0
